name: Baked Brussels Sprouts Au Gratin#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Wash Brussels sprouts and "x" the bottom of each.
3. Place in boiling water, enough to cover. Boil and simmer for 10 minutes or until tender.
4. Drain and reserve 1 cup hot liquid.
5. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add green onions and sauté for 3 minutes.
6. Stir in flour and cook until dissolved, about 3 minutes.
7. Add bacon, garlic, and parsley; cook for an additional 3 minutes.
8. Pour in reserved water, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly until thickened to the consistency of heavy cream.
9. Remove bacon from sauce.
10. Place sprouts base down in a buttered casserole dish. Pour sauce over top.
11. Sprinkle grated cheese and bread crumbs evenly on top.
12. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top is browned.
